name: Giant Hershey's Kiss
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except vanilla and walnuts in a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Microwave on HIGH for two minutes.
3. Add vanilla and walnuts to the mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a generously buttered large funnel (secure a piece of foil over the end with a rubber band), making sure you fill the spout end.
5. Place the funnel in a tumbled or cup and set in the freezer or refrigerator until set.
6. Carefully unmold and wrap with foil to create a big "kiss". You can add a streamer stating "For Chocolate Lover's Only" to finish it.
7. To make mini-kisses, use a small funnel of the type intended for filling perfume bottles. These can be purchased at most cosmetic or variety stores.
